title: InternalTextPackage
description: Schema for .pack.json files describing an internal text package (compiled asset payloads + GUID cross-references).

kind.description: Discriminator for the internal text package type.

guid36.description: RFC 4122 36-char dash-form UUID. Sentinel strings like '@builtin/...' are rejected at the schema level (AC-11).

guid.description: Unique GUID for this asset entry.

name.description: Optional display name for this asset. Add-only field for backward compatibility with old pack files that lack it.

refs.description: GUID cross-references. Each element must be an RFC 4122 36-char dash-form UUID. @builtin/ sentinels are explicitly excluded (AC-11).
